name: Zesty New Potato Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Scrub the new potatoes and cut them into 1/4-inch thick slices.
2. Place the sliced potatoes in a 1 1/2 quart casserole dish.
3. Add water and salt to the casserole dish.
4. Cover and microwave on High for 8 to 10 minutes, or until the potatoes are almost done. Let stand for 3 minutes.
5. Carefully drain any excess liquid from the potatoes.
6. In a separate bowl, combine the Zesty Italian salad dressing with the remaining ingredients (minced green onions, chopped fresh parsley, and chopped pimiento). Stir well to mix.
7. Pour the mixture over the potatoes, tossing gently to coat them thoroughly.
8. Cover the dish and refrigerate for at least 3 hours before serving.
Yield: 4 servings.
